title: KNIGHT PROJECT - 211info
text: SQUIRES KNIGHT PROJECT Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a course for individuals interested in expanding the bounds of fatherhood. Program participants will complete 50 hours of reading to their children, 2 hours of financial literacy education, 2 hours of parenting education, and other courses over a 6 month period. Upon completion of the program, participants receive a family photo package, t-shirt, and a $100 gift certificate. Free pizza is offered at all meetings. Eligibility: Males age 14-25 who are parents or parents to be Hours: September-June: 3rd Thursday of the month starting at 6:30pm. Summer hours vary; check Facebook for location information. Email (503) 421-0933 Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 421-0933 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in or call for more information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None AREA SERVED: Clackamas and Multnomah Counties Services: Parenting Skills Classes * Fathers Other Services Offered At This Location: INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - SQUIRES EMPOWERING YOUNG DADS If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
